DataRequest.Name: Windows PowerShell Opening External Connections / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects a Powershell opening external connections to external IP addresses. This rule requires Windows sysmon events collected via FortiSIEM Advanced Windows Agent.
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Windows PowerShell Opening External Connections from $hostName to $destIpAddr

SubPattern.name: Install
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType CONTAIN "Win-Sysmon-3-Network-Connect" AND procName REGEXP ".*\\\\powershell\\.exe$" AND destIpAddr NOT IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET) AND destGeoOrg NOT CONTAIN "MICROSOFT" AND user!="NT AUTHORITY\\\\SYSTEM"
